examples.title: EPR Authorization Process
examples.description: Algorithm for producer to obtain EPR authorization
examples.code:
PROCEDURE ApplyForEPR
BEGIN
 Step1: Register on CPCB portal with company details
 Step2: Fill application form with:
 - Annual production quantity
 - Expected e-waste generation
 - Collection target calculation
 Step3: Submit partnership agreements with:
 - Producer Responsibility Organization (PRO)
 - Authorized e-waste recyclers
 Step4: Document collection mechanism plan:
 - Collection center locations
 - Buy-back/Exchange schemes
 - Take-back program details
 Step5: Pay application fees
 Step6: CPCB reviews application (30 days)
 Step7: IF approved THEN
 Receive EPR Authorization Certificate
 File quarterly returns
 ELSE
 Resubmit with corrections
 ENDIF
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode outlines the step-by-step procedure producers must follow to obtain EPR authorization from CPCB under the E-Waste Management Rules 2022.
